leadText: Secret Shore (Japanese: ひみつのいそべ Secret Shore) is a location in Hoenn with many Secret Spots where Secret Bases can be made. Other than Flying and soaring, it can only be accessed by surfacing from the easternmost large Dive spot in the underwater area on Route 129.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] The Secret Shore is a rocky peninsula of beach with small channels of shallow water ebbing and flowing through parts of it. There are six Secret Spots spread throughout the area. Flying or soaring to this location, the player will land in the shallow water south of the entrance. There are no Trainers , wild Pokémon , or items here.
